# Fetch Error Handling Test
# Tests error scenarios and security restrictions

# Build the fetch server binary
go build -o mcp-fetch-server .

# Test error handling scenarios
exec mcp-fetch-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"ftp://example.com/test"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"http://localhost:8080/test"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"http://127.0.0.1/test"}},"id":5}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"http://192.168.1.1/test"}},"id":6}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{"url":"invalid-url"}},"id":7}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch","arguments":{}},"id":8}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"get_headers","arguments":{"url":"http://10.0.0.1/test"}},"id":9}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"fetch_text","arguments":{"url":"javascript:alert('xss')"}},"id":10}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"invalid_tool","arguments":{}},"id":11}
EOF

# Verify unsupported scheme error
stdout 'unsupported scheme.*ftp'

# Verify private IP blocking
stdout 'private IP addresses are not allowed'

# Verify localhost blocking
stdout 'private IP addresses are not allowed.*localhost'
stdout 'private IP addresses are not allowed.*127'

# Verify invalid URL error
stdout 'invalid URL'

# Verify missing argument error
stdout 'missing required argument.*url'

# Verify private network ranges blocked
stdout 'private IP addresses are not allowed.*192.168'
stdout 'private IP addresses are not allowed.*10'

# Verify unsupported schemes blocked
stdout 'unsupported scheme.*javascript'

# Verify tool not found error
stdout '"error"'
stdout 'method not found'
